name: playIN Golf
address: 200 Wild Dunes Way, Old Orchard Beach, ME 04064
about: playIN Golf is a full-service indoor golf venue located at Dunegrass Golf Club in Old Orchard Beach, with an additional location at Cowbell Restaurant in Scarborough. The facility utilizes state-of-the-art simulators to provide a lifelike golf experience, making it ideal for both avid golfers looking to maintain their skills during winter months and novices seeking to learn without the intimidation of an actual course. PlayIN Golf caters to various needs, from individual practice and league play to group events and social outings, offering a convenient and accessible golfing alternative in Maine.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-best ball tracking technology using regular, non-marked golf balls
Ability to play world-class courses that have hosted PGA events
Two convenient locations (Dunegrass and Cowbell Restaurant) for flexible play
Advanced swing analytics for game improvement
Variety of simulator modes including driving range and arcade-style competitions

simulator_hardware.notes: The FSG sim is noted as 'the closest thing to being out on the course' by Jordan Spieth

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own clubs. The simulators use regular, non-marked golf balls.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available for purchase at the Cowbell Restaurant location. Policies may vary at the Dunegrass location.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes requires roughly one hour of simulator time, per person.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and caters to families, offering a welcoming environment for golfers of all ages and skill levels.
